episodes.title: Inside the Cult of Eugène Terre'Blanche
episodes.description:
In the shadow of South Africa's tense transition to democracy, one extremist militia was determined to tear the nation apart. Today, we investigate the Afrikaner Weerstandsbeweging (AWB) and its notorious leader, Eugène Terre'Blanche.

How did a fringe group founded in a Heidelberg garage grow into a heavily armed paramilitary force? We dive deep into the dark history of the AWB, their push for an independent, white-only 'Volkstaat,' their violent clashes with the state like the Battle of Ventersdorp, and the spectacular collapse of their radical ideology in 1994.

This is a deep dive into one of the most volatile chapters in South African political history. Let me know your thoughts on this dark piece of our history in the comments below.

👇 Don't forget to LIKE and SUBSCRIBE for more deep dives into South African politics and history!
